creator: wulf@freebsd.org
text:
That should be noted that recent changes in CURRENT, namely r298922 and r298982 should allow kernel to pass all regression tests except symlinks-related

Also one of the reasons of https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=204366 is fixed so patch patch-src_inotifywatch.c can be removed from sysutils/inotify-tools
